title: Tangy Juicy Moroccan Fromage Blanc Bissara
description: A traditional Moroccan dish featuring fromage blanc, reduced to perfection, with a grassy and juicy flavor profile, this bissara is a nostalgic treat, ayurvedic tamasic friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the fromage blanc, lemon juice, olive oil, paprika, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the chopped parsley, cilantro, and green garlic to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Gradually add the water to the bowl, whisking continuously until the desired consistency is reached.
Reduce the mixture over low heat, stirring frequently, until it has thickened slightly and reduced by about half.
Remove the bissara from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Serve the bissara chilled, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
Before serving, give the bissara a good stir and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
